title: Jupyter Kernel Specification
description: Schema for Jupyter kernel specifications (kernelspecs). A kernelspec defines how to launch a specific type of computational kernel, including the command, language, display name, and associated resources.

name.description: Unique name of the kernel specification (e.g., 'python3', 'ir', 'julia-1.9').

argv.description: Command and arguments to launch the kernel. The special string '{connection_file}' is replaced with the path to the kernel's connection file.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for the kernel, shown in UIs.

language.description: The programming language of the kernel (e.g., 'python', 'R', 'julia').

env.description: Environment variables to set when launching the kernel.

resources.description: Resource files associated with the kernel spec, such as logo images.

logo-32x32.description: Path or URL to the 32x32 pixel kernel logo.

logo-64x64.description: Path or URL to the 64x64 pixel kernel logo.

logo-svg.description: Path or URL to the SVG kernel logo.
